span.p:
_candidate_selection()
rank by type -> scenario -> severity ->
decision debt -> governance lag -> blast radius

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Scenario coverage pass
take highest-ranked case per scenario first

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Priority fill pass
fill remaining slots by score

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stable tie-break inside score bands
scope_id then scope_key

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Run-scoped provider breaker
timeout or transport failure disables
provider enrichment for remaining cases

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Selected case queue
selection_slot + selection_reason +
selection_metrics + selection_score_band_size

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
selection_summary
total / eligible / shown / truncated + mixes
